name: Console
tagline: Modern dark-mode tech · violet → cyan gradient brand · Linear × Vercel × Cursor × Anthropic

color._canvas: Near-pure black canvas. First dark theme since v1-v5 era.
color._text: Soft white — never pure #FFF, easier on the eyes
color._brand: Violet primary + violet→cyan gradient for hero moments. Kept on --sage* for script compat.
color._secondary: Cyan for info/data, coral for AI moments
color._semantic: Tuned for dark backgrounds — vivid text on soft backgrounds

font.mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
font._note: Mono for numbers, times, codes, labels. Sans for body copy + headlines.

elevation._note: Dark theme uses glow effects more than blur shadows. Border is the card's identity.
